rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is unrelated to Gov't Code §2306.204, which governs annual independent audits of the housing trust fund. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 2306.204. INDEPENDENT AUDIT OF HOUSING TRUST FUND.
_note: No conflict; the rule_text concerns housing trust fund audits, not property tax homestead exemptions.
